title: bobartia fasciculata
intro: Bobartia fasciculata, also known as the dwarf leonotis or African devil, is a flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to southern Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bobartia fasciculata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a poultice or ointment to apply topically.
